'''âsh-t-h-k''' ('''kashathekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quart|quart]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-t-h-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quart|quart]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-t-h-k
|-
! Lemma
| kashathekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thishathekoko || jishathekoko || shishathekoko || kishathekoko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthushathekoko || jujushathekoko || shushushathekoko || kukushathekoko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thushathekoko || jushathekoko || shushathekoko || kushathekoko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thushathekoko || jushathekoko || shushathekoko || kushathekoko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || theshathekoko || jeshathekoko || sheshathekoko || keshathekoko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothoshathekoko || jojoshathekoko || shoshoshathekoko || kokoshathekoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thoshathekoko || joshathekoko || shoshathekoko || koshathekoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thoshathekoko || joshathekoko || shoshathekoko || koshathekoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || shathekoko || shathekoko || shathekoko || shathekoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || shathekoko || shathekoko || shathekoko || shathekoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || shathekoko || shathekoko || shathekoko || shathekoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || shathekoko || shathekoko || shathekoko || shathekoko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thĂŠshathekoko || jĂŠshathekoko || shĂŠshathekoko || kĂŠshathekoko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathashathekoko || jajashathekoko || shashashathekoko || kakashathekoko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thashathekoko || jashathekoko || shashathekoko || kashathekoko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thashathekoko || jashathekoko || shashathekoko || kashathekoko
|}
=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || shashathekithi || shashathekiji || shashathekishi || shashathekiki
